rationale: Builds on the current best soft quant-aware projection-ramp path without changing the hot loop or artifact format. The current row-wise clip percentile is effectively max-abs for 512-wide rows, so projection matrices still let single outliers dominate int8 range. This variant keeps the winning adaptive row-offset quantizer everywhere else, but lowers clipping only for attn/MLP projection weights so those rows get a gentler, actually-active clip during both quant-aware roundtrips and final serialization.
title: Projection-Only Gentle Int8 Clipping
